description: This status check in app/api/api_v1/endpoints/families.py::create_family controls a business workflow. The AI needs to understand the rules governing when this transition is valid. — The 32-byte key length is required by AES-256 encryption standard. This is a security requirement.

This is a legal compliance requirement that cannot be overridden.

This is a product decision, not a calculation error.
constraint: len(buys) > 0 and len(sells) > 0 and len(buys) == len(sells)
